Query.Sql: with ha as ( select Record ->> '$.Haematological.HaematologicalCore.HaematologicalCoreLinkagePatientId.NHSNumber.@extension' as NhsNumber, unnest( [ [ Record ->> '$.Haematological.HaematologicalCore.HaematologicalCoreTreatment.CancerTreatmentIntent.@code' ], Record ->> '$.Haematological.HaematologicalCore.HaematologicalCoreTreatment[*].CancerTreatmentIntent.@code' ], recursive := true ) as CancerTreatmentIntent, unnest( [ [ Record ->> '$.Haematological.HaematologicalCore.HaematologicalCoreTreatment.CancerTreatmentStartDate' ], Record ->> '$.Haematological.HaematologicalCore.HaematologicalCoreTreatment[*].CancerTreatmentStartDate' ], recursive := true ) as TreatmentStartDateCancer from omop_staging.cosd_staging_81 where type = 'HA' ) select distinct NhsNumber, TreatmentStartDateCancer, CancerTreatmentIntent from ha where NhsNumber is not null and CancerTreatmentIntent is not null and TreatmentStartDateCancer is not null;

Explanation.Description: The start date of a cancer treatment during a Cancer Care Spell.
The intention of the cancer treatment provided during a Cancer Care Spell.
